MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Campbell, property manager, appeared on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Health
Arnold Walter Evje, II, counsel for plaintiff

Carol Richards, defendant, was present
Joseph Koomas, Esq. by special scope appearance for defendant

Settlement conference held. Parties entered into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 64 Turk Street, #403, San Francisco, California.

Trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
